Tests.name: Static + Pseudorange error
Tests.comment: Increasing pseudorange error in the test period of 5 to 15 min, up to 1800 m. This gives a pseudorange error of 3 m/s, equivalent to a time error of 9 ns/s. A total accumulated time error of 6 µs,  - Annex Bleik 2.4.12
